description_long: This arcade game cabinet is a classic upright machine featuring vibrant artwork themed around the game 'Duck Hunt.' The cabinet is primarily blue with pixelated graphics of ducks, a dog, and grassy terrain, evoking a retro 8-bit video game aesthetic. The front panel includes a screen displaying the game, a joystick, several colored buttons, and two mounted black light gun controllers with cables. The marquee at the top displays the 'DUCK HUNT' title in bold, blocky letters on a black background. The side panels are decorated with large, colorful graphics of ducks in flight and the iconic hunting dog, enhancing its visual appeal. The lower front section features a coin slot and a small access door, typical of arcade machines.
description: A retro upright 'Duck Hunt' arcade game cabinet with blue side panels, pixel art graphics, a screen, joystick, buttons, and dual light gun controllers.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the blue panel with large pixelated duck and dog graphics, and the protruding black light gun controllers.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the screen with 'Duck Hunt' title, joystick, colored buttons, dual light gun controllers, and the coin slot below.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with matching blue panel artwork and visible control panel with guns and buttons.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain black back panel with no artwork or controls visible.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, slightly curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one red joystick, four colored buttons arranged in a row, and two black light gun controllers mounted on either side.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features 'DUCK HUNT' in large, bold, light blue letters on a black background, matching the retro game theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels are decorated with large, colorful pixel art graphics of ducks in flight and a hunting dog, set against a blue background with grassy terrain.
